title: clarkia quadrivulnera
intro: Clarkia quadrivulnera, also known as the four-angled clarkia or fireplug clarkia, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Clarkia quadrivulnera include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Clarkia quadrivulnera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for topical use, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
